name: ui-skills
description: Reverse-engineer any live website into production-ready React + Tailwind code. Reads actual computed CSS, DOM structure, JS interactions, and animations — not just a screenshot. Downloads visual assets and extracts inline SVGs verbatim. 5-bundle design token grouping (surface, shape, type, tone, motion) with covariance rules ensures bundled properties change together. 10-point design fidelity scoring loop for fix iteration guidance with rollback on regression. 6-stage pre-generation design audit: data inventory, role identification, grouping, layout direction, bundle verification, component boundaries. Auto-detects responsive breakpoints, scroll behavior, custom scroll containers, portal-escaped elements, mouse-follow interactions, and stroke-based SVG hover animations. Animation detection: 3-phase motion detection (idle → scroll → per-element tracking). Verifies output with AE/SSIM pixel diff (zero LLM tokens) + scoring loop (diagnostic) + DOM clip screenshot pixel diff (completion gate) + VLM sanity check (1 screenshot pair). Post-generation style audit compares class-level computed styles. Includes sub-skills for animation extraction (WAAPI, canvas/WebGL, scroll-driven JS), visual baseline capture, trigger-type-aware recording, and overlay-based analysis report with interactive transition previews pinned at exact page coordinates.
